title: Mapping the Landscape of LGBTQ+ Hope Spots: An Arctic Equality Map
summary: This article provides high-level analysis of LGBTQ+ human rights in the Arctic through an Arctic LGBTQ+ Equality Map. The post Mapping the Landscape of LGBTQ+ Hope Spots: An Arctic Equality Map appeared first on The Arctic Institute - Center for Circumpolar Security Studies .

title: MissChiefs finish third at state
summary: The season came to an abrupt end for the Metlakatla volleyball team on Saturday morning in Palmer, but not before the MissChiefs had made an historic run that set a new standard for the program, culminating with a third-place finish…
